category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks MP3 files for errors; official Checkmate page says mpck is the command-line interface for checking MP3 files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mpck; official site identifies Mpck as the command-line interface in Checkmate MP3 Checker.
docs_sources: Official Checkmate site has a Documentation page with manual links; official GitHub README includes mpck usage.
repo_sources: Official Checkmate homepage links to GitHub; linked repository is Sjord/checkmate.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes checking MP3 frame/header errors and identifies mpck as the CLI.
